reviews.review_msg: It is a relatively easy course but the professor definitely played a factor. The course is focused on reading responses and discussion posts for each module. The TA's give lots of specific feedback and entire teaching team are easy to contact. Didn't directly interact with professor as it is mainly readings based. Highly recommend as a bird course.
She is very nice and approachable, not just for this course but also as my BUS217 TA!
